name: web3-frontend-labs
description: Web3 frontend labs for wallet auth, trading flow, multi-chain interaction, realtime state and metadata upload demos.

scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules package-lock.json apps/*/.next apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules
scripts.contracts:deploy:local:raw: cd contracts/foundry && source .env && forge script script/DeployLocal.s.sol --rpc-url "$LOCAL_RPC_URL" --private-key "$PRIVATE_KEY" --broadcast
scripts.deploy:local: npm run contracts:build && npm run contracts:deploy:local:raw && npm run contracts:sync
scripts.contracts:deploy:token-launch:raw: cd contracts/foundry && source .env && forge script script/DeployTokenLaunch.s.sol --rpc-url "$LOCAL_RPC_URL" --private-key "$PRIVATE_KEY" --broadcast
scripts.deploy:token-launch: npm run contracts:build && npm run contracts:deploy:token-launch:raw && npm run contracts:sync:token-launch
